goal: Sub-300ms latency backend handling Vapi webhooks, Qdrant hybrid semantic memory, and mock UPI transactions

phases.name: Phase 1: Foundation
phases.description: Infrastructure, logging, config, and server scaffold

tasks.title: Structured logger
tasks.description: Create src/lib/logger.ts using pino with request-id correlation and child logger factory

tasks.title: Config loader
tasks.description: Create src/lib/config.ts using zod to validate env vars (PORT, QDRANT_URL, QDRANT_API_KEY, VAPI_SECRET)

tasks.title: Hono server scaffold
tasks.description: Create src/index.ts with health check GET /health route, request logging middleware, and global error handler

tasks.title: Latency middleware
tasks.description: Add middleware that measures and logs response time; warn if > 300ms

phases.name: Phase 2: Vapi Webhook Integration
phases.description: Webhook router, validation, signature verification, and tool dispatch

tasks.title: Zod schemas for Vapi
tasks.description: Create src/webhooks/schemas.ts with VapiToolCallRequest and VapiToolCallResponse zod schemas

tasks.title: Webhook router
tasks.description: Create src/webhooks/router.ts with POST /webhook/vapi route that validates, dispatches to tool handlers, and returns results

tasks.title: Signature verification middleware
tasks.description: Verify x-vapi-signature HMAC-SHA256 header on incoming webhook requests

tasks.title: Tool dispatcher
tasks.description: Map tool names (checkBalance, sendMoney, getTransactionHistory) to handler functions

phases.name: Phase 3: Qdrant Hybrid Semantic Memory
phases.description: Vector database integration for contextual understanding and personalization

tasks.title: Qdrant client singleton
tasks.description: Create src/services/qdrant.ts with connection pooling and health check

tasks.title: Collection bootstrap
tasks.description: Script to create user_memory collection with dense (384-dim) + sparse vectors

tasks.title: Embedding service
tasks.description: Create src/services/embedding.ts to generate dense embeddings (lightweight model or mock for hackathon)

tasks.title: Memory store
tasks.description: upsertMemory(userId, text, metadata) — store user interaction context as vector points

tasks.title: Memory recall
tasks.description: recallMemory(userId, query, topK) — hybrid search with RRF fusion for context-aware responses

phases.name: Phase 4: Mock UPI Transaction Engine
phases.description: In-memory UPI simulation with balance management and transaction history

tasks.title: Account store
tasks.description: In-memory map of userId to balance in src/services/upi.ts

tasks.title: checkBalance handler
tasks.description: Returns current balance for a user

tasks.title: sendMoney handler
tasks.description: Validates sender balance, deducts, credits recipient, returns confirmation string

tasks.title: getTransactionHistory handler
tasks.description: Returns last N transactions from in-memory ledger, stores each as Qdrant memory point

phases.name: Phase 5: Integration & Latency Optimization
phases.description: End-to-end testing, warm-up, caching, and load testing

tasks.title: End-to-end webhook test
tasks.description: Vitest test simulating full Vapi webhook cycle: receive tool call → query Qdrant → execute UPI → respond

tasks.title: Connection warm-up
tasks.description: Pre-connect to Qdrant on server start to avoid cold-start latency

tasks.title: Response caching
tasks.description: Cache frequent Qdrant queries (balance lookups) with TTL for sub-300ms responses

tasks.title: Load test script
tasks.description: Simple script using fetch in a loop to verify p95 < 300ms
